description: Authenticate (beam in) as an OASIS avatar. Required before any STARNET operation that mutates data.
notes: Prefer env vars STAR_CLI_USERNAME / STAR_CLI_PASSWORD over inline credentials when available.
When the IDE user is already logged in, STAR_CLI_USERNAME and STAR_CLI_PASSWORD are populated from their session — no need to ask for credentials again.
On success returns { success: true, data: { avatarId, username, ... } }.

env_var_variant.description: Use env vars instead of inline creds (preferred for security)
